title: Bia's Ocean Project
description: A narrative lesson about environmental activism and vocabulary for ocean conservation.
summary_pt_br: Vocabulário ambiental: pollution, conservation, marine life, sustainable. Voz passiva pra descrever.

scenes.subtitle_en: A narrative lesson about environmental activism and vocabulary for ocean conservation.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Vocabulário ambiental: pollution, conservation, marine life, sustainable. Voz passiva pra descrever.

scenes.text_en: A narrative lesson about environmental activism and vocabulary for ocean conservation. Today's focus: bia's ocean project. Plastic pollution is destroying our oceans slowly.
scenes.text_pt: Vocabulário ambiental: pollution, conservation, marine life, sustainable. Voz passiva pra descrever. Foco de hoje: bia's ocean project. A poluição plástica está destruindo nossos oceanos.

scenes.title: Bia's Ocean Project
scenes.body_en: Environmental vocabulary: pollution, conservation, marine life, sustainable, biodiversity. Passive voice for impersonal description.
scenes.body_pt: Vocabulário ambiental: pollution, conservation, marine life, sustainable. Voz passiva pra descrever.

examples.en: Plastic pollution is destroying our oceans slowly.
examples.pt: A poluição plástica está destruindo nossos oceanos.

examples.en: Marine life must be protected for future generations.
examples.pt: A vida marinha precisa ser protegida.

examples.en: Sustainable fishing should be taught in every school.
examples.pt: Pesca sustentável deveria ser ensinada em toda escola.

exercise.question: Complete: "Plastic pollution is ___ our oceans slowly."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Plastic pollution is destroying our oceans slowly."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A poluição plástica está destruindo nossos oceanos.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Marine life must be protected for future generations.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Marine life must be protected for future generations."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A vida marinha precisa ser protegida.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Bia's Ocean Project — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre bia's ocean project. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Bia, tell me about your beach cleanup project.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We collect plastic every Sunday morning.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How many people usually join you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Around twenty teens and their families.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What surprised you most about the data?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: How much comes from fishing gear, not tourists.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Do you partner with any organizations?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: A small NGO helps us with tools and training.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's your long-term goal for the project?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: To make beach conservation part of school.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Change starts exactly where you are standing, Bia.

scenes.title: Sunday on the beach
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe Bia's project in detail. Use at least three environmental vocabulary words.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Every Sunday before breakfast, a small group of volunteers gathered at Praia do Sol with buckets and gloves.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Plastic pollution is destroying the reef that we've been diving in since we were children.

paragraphs.speaker: Volunteer
paragraphs.en: Last month, we collected over two tons of waste in just four cleanups.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Marine biodiversity must be protected, or our grandchildren will only see it in videos.

paragraphs.speaker: Teacher
paragraphs.en: Sustainable fishing practices should be taught in every coastal school in the country.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The ocean could not speak for itself — but at Praia do Sol, twenty teenagers had decided to speak for it.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Bia's Ocean Project". A narrative lesson about environmental activism and vocabulary for ocean conservation. Plastic pollution is destroying our oceans slowly. Marine life must be protected for future generations. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Bia's Ocean Project". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Bia's Ocean Project".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: BBC 6 Minute English
sources.pt_hint: Podcast curto com transcrição — nível B1.
